title: Senior Accounts Executive (Full Set) | Changi Air Freight Center | Up to $3.5K
description:
• Basic $3,000 – $3,500 + AWS + Variable Bonus (VB).

  • 5-Day Work Week (Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM).

  • East Zone of Singapore (Convenient for residents in Tampines, Pasir Ris, Bedok)

  • Immediate Starters preferred!

Job Summary

We are looking for a meticulous and qualified Senior Accounts Executive to oversee our full spectrum of financial operations. You will be responsible for ensuring the integrity of our financial data, from daily ledger management to the preparation of comprehensive financial statements.

Key Responsibilities

  • Full Spectrum Accounting: Independently manage the Full Set of Accounts, including Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts Receivable (AR), and General Ledger (GL).

  • Financial Reporting: Prepare accurate and timely monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.

  • Cash Flow Management: Monitor working capital, daily bank balances, and perform regular bank reconciliations.

  • Revenue & Cost Integrity: Ensure precise recording of revenue, costs, accruals, and prepayments to maintain audit-ready records.

  • Ad-hoc Support: Assist in other financial duties or projects as assigned by management.

Requirements

  • Qualifications: Minimum LCCI or ACCA (attained or pursuing).

  • Experience: Proven experience in handling Full Set of Accounts.

  • Availability: Able to start immediately or within a short notice period.

  • Attributes: Strong analytical skills, detail-oriented, and able to work independently in a fast-paced logistics hub.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
